messages.text: Hey team, our staging deployment process: push to main branch, GitHub Actions builds Docker image, pushes to Docker Hub, then Render auto-deploys. Takes about 4-5 minutes total.
Reminder: all API keys go in .env file, never commit them. Use ANTHROPIC_API_KEY for Claude, SLACK_BOT_TOKEN for Slack integration.
ChromaDB data persists in ./chroma_db directory. If you reset it, run python scripts/ingest.py again to re-index everything.
Sprint planning is every Monday 10am IST. Post your updates in #standup before 9:30am. Use the format: Done / Doing / Blocked.
Our onboarding checklist for new engineers: 1) Request GitHub org access from @alice 2) Set up .env from 1Password vault 3) Run docker-compose up 4) Read the architecture doc in Notion.
Bug triage happens every Wednesday 3pm IST in #bugs channel. P0 bugs get fixed same day, P1 within 48 hours, P2 in current sprint.
Leave policy: 12 annual leaves, 6 sick leaves per year. Submit requests in Zoho at least 3 days in advance. Manager approval required for more than 3 consecutive days.
Work from home policy: up to 3 days per week. Core hours are 11am-4pm IST where everyone must be reachable. Log your WFH days in the shared calendar.
Reimbursements: submit bills via Zoho Expense within 30 days of purchase. Internet allowance is Rs 1000/month, learning budget is Rs 10000/year per employee.
